Container.Name: hf-model-downloader
Container.Overview: Web UI to browse and download models from HuggingFace Hub. Features: file browser, download queue with pause/resume/cancel, sync status comparison, explore/search with tag and sort filters, optional Basic Auth, and HF Token support for private repos.
Container.Description: Web UI to browse and download models from HuggingFace Hub. Features: file browser, download queue with pause/resume/cancel, sync status comparison, explore/search with tag and sort filters, optional Basic Auth, and HF Token support for private repos.

Config.Name: App Data Path
Config.Description: Host directory for app state (queue persistence, future settings). Should point to your appdata folder.

Config.Name: Downloads Path
Config.Description: Host directory where downloaded models are stored. Persists across container restarts.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Internal container path for app state (queue persistence). Change only if you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Token
Config.Description: Optional. HuggingFace API token (read access). Required for private or gated repositories (e.g. Llama, Gemma). Leave empty for public repos only.

Config.Name: Basic Auth Username
Config.Description: Optional. Username for Basic Auth. If set, AUTH_PASS must also be set. Leave both empty to disable authentication (open access on your local network).

Config.Name: Basic Auth Password
Config.Description: Optional. Password for Basic Auth. Only active when AUTH_USER is also set.

Config.Name: Flask Debug Mode
Config.Description: Enable Flask debug mode. Set to 'true' only for local development — NEVER in production, as it allows remote code execution.
